:00-5:00 pm The BEARS Center for Hybrid and Embedded Software Systems (CHESS) Open House will be held on Thursday, February 23, 2006, from 3:00-5:00 pm. At the open house we will feature demonstrations and posters by Chess

feature demonstrations and posters by Chess Students and Faculty. During the morning, there are talks by faculty members . BEARS gives industrial partners of the university the opportunity to have firsthand interaction

opportunity to have firsthand interaction with students and faculty in a research context. This is beneficial to industrial participants, to make connections between ongoing work in academia and emerging problems in industry, as

in academia and emerging problems in industry, as well as to student participants, to seek out relevant "real-world" applications for their work, and to make contacts for future interaction. You can find the overview poster here,
